criteria_version: search/inclusion_criteria.md §1 (Stage-1 title-abstract screen) — priority batch 4, ranks 300-399

decisions.reason: Psychological Reports 2013 N=160 experiment on DITF with two different requesters; eligible (experimental, DITF, charity-compliance outcome).
J Applied Soc Psych 2013 double-FITD experiment on multi-week energy-saving behavior; eligible (experimental, FITD variant, behavior outcome).
Health Psych 2011 online RCT on gain/loss framing × perceived risk for HIV-test intentions; eligible.
Psychological Reports 2008 — duplicate of i=73 (FITD courtship); flag at dedup-extraction.
Psychology & Marketing 2006 two experiments on regulatory fit × ad claims × brand preferences; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, brand-evaluation outcome).
Swiss J Psych 2005 three experiments on framing × children's EV judgments; eligible (experimental, framing, decision outcome — children meet §2.1 as decision-makers in commercial-analog gambles).
Political Psychology 2004 three experiments on prospect-theory framing in international-relations contexts; political-decision context not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
Journal of Psychology 1987 FITD experiment in Thailand with material payment / social reinforcement / familiarity mediators; eligible.
Psychology & Health 2011 study on RFT framing for fruit/vegetable consumption; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior intent outcome).
Psychological Reports 2004 quasi-replication of Uranowitz FITD with implicit demand in France; eligible (replication, FITD, compliance outcome).
J Social Psych 1988 telephone-survey experiment on FITD/DITF × source legitimacy; eligible.
Marketing Management Journal 2026 study on gain/loss framing × rational/emotional ad appeals × brand choice; eligible (experimental, framing, consumer attitude/choice outcome).

Frontiers in Public Health 2026 2×2×2 design (N=630) on authority/scarcity/conformity cues in social-media supplement ads → purchase intention; eligible (experimental, multiple persuasion mechanisms, purchase outcome).
J Theoretical and Applied Electronic Commerce 2025 two experiments on concrete vs abstract green ad messages × consumer responses; eligible (experimental, construal, consumer-response outcome).
Business & Management Compass 2025 study on age × authority-type ad strategies for consumer susceptibility; eligible (experimental, authority manipulation, consumer outcome).
Computers in Human Behavior Artificial Humans 2024 three studies (online questionnaire + lab + field) on FITD effect in human-robot interaction; eligible (experimental, FITD, compliance outcome).
Information 2023 paper on ChatGPT + persuasive tech for hotel upselling recommendation messages; eligible (commercial-context persuasion intervention).
OSF Registration 2023 of preregistered Prolific online experiments on FITD in procurement auction surcharging; eligible (preregistration of empirical study, FITD, commercial-pricing outcome).

Data and Information Management 2022 controlled experiment on gain-framed product descriptions × elderly purchase intent in live-streaming e-commerce; eligible (commercial context, framing, purchase outcome).
IntechOpen 2021 online experiment on ad framing for sugar-intake control; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior intent outcome).
LSE Research 2021 — duplicate of i=1 (social media influencer 7 heuristics); flag at dedup-extraction.
Mass Communication & Society 2021 conceptual replication of prospect theory in COVID-19 pandemic risky-choice contexts (US/Netherlands); eligible.
Sustainability 2020 systematic review of experimental studies on cause-related marketing × consumer purchase intent; eligible (review of primary experimental literature).
IEEE Access 2020 study on gain-loss framed push notifications × purchase intent for cart abandonment; eligible (experimental, framing, purchase-completion outcome).
J Travel Research 2018 experiments on anchoring × framing × metric compatibility for accommodation willingness-to-pay; eligible (experimental, anchoring, WTP outcome).
SHS Web of Conferences 2017 experimental study on different social-proof techniques × purchasing intent; eligible.
2017 study on social proof + scarcity for opera ticket purchase responses; eligible (experimental, two persuasion mechanisms, ticket-purchase outcome).
Communication Quarterly 2016 three-study analysis of DITF concession-size × compliance relationship; eligible (synthesis of empirical DITF literature).
J Current Issues Research Advertising 2015 experiment on gain/loss framing × point-of-reference × product involvement for green advertising; eligible.
2014 experiment on Cialdini's six influence principles in recommender-system explanations; eligible (experimental, multiple persuasion principles, recommendation-acceptance outcome).
2013 experiment on media-mix (ad/website/publicity) × sequencing × message acceptance / purchase intent; eligible.
Communication Monographs 2012 random-effects meta-analysis of 35 years of DITF (k=78 verbal, k=39 behavioral); eligible (meta-analysis).
Social Behavior and Personality 2012 ecological experiment on requester odor × FITD compliance; eligible.
Public Health Nursing 2012 study on framing × parents' HPV vaccination intent for children; eligible.
ClinicalTrials.gov 2010 RCT on brief persuasive-message interventions for HPV vaccine acceptance in adolescents; eligible (RCT, persuasion intervention, behavior outcome).

Fashion & Textile Research Journal 2010 2×2 factorial N=160 experiment on social-proof message type × product type in online cosmetic ads; eligible (experimental, social-proof, advertising-persuasion outcome).
Communication Studies 2009 two field experiments on dump-and-chase persistence as sequential-request technique; eligible (field experiments, DITF-variant, compliance outcome).
Int Review Retail Distribution 2008 field experiment N=375 on DITF in alpine-hut retail sales; eligible (field experiment, DITF, retail-sales outcome — directly on-thesis).
2008 N=59 FITD-by-telephone-then-mail experiment for energy-saving project compliance; eligible (FITD, compliance outcome).
Communication Monographs 2007 3×3 DITF moderator/mediator test (reciprocal concessions vs social responsibility); eligible (experimental, DITF, compliance outcome).
1996 dissertation on tensile price claims × consumer perception (assimilation contrast vs anchoring-adjustment); eligible (dissertation per §4.8, anchoring, consumer-perception outcome).
Health Education Research 1988 theoretical review of message framing (gain/loss/fear) for health behavior compliance; eligible (synthesis of empirical literature).
Wgtn (Victoria University) 2023 thesis-like work on gain/loss framing in political advertising × ideology; political-decision context — need full text to judge §2.1.
JMIR 2023 preprint on gain/loss framing HPV vaccine × ERP attention measures; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior-intent outcome).
Psychosomatic Medicine 2007 neuroimaging study on dispositional mindfulness × affect labeling; basic neuroscience research, not commercial — need full text to judge §5.1 sales-mechanism parallel.
Health Communication 2026 study on congruency of target/gain-loss framing × regulatory focus; eligible (experimental, framing, persuasion outcome).
Judgment and Decision Making 2025 seven studies on gain/loss framing × cheating (null finding); framing manipulation but outcome is cheating not commercial compliance; need full text per §2.1.
J Global Scholars Marketing Science 2024 study on gain/loss framing × Machiavellian consumers; eligible (commercial-context experimental study, framing, consumer outcome).
Journal of Marketing 2023 research on vaccine adoption innovation diffusion × social-proof; eligible (commercial-decision-analog adoption, social-proof, behavior outcome).
European J Marketing 2020 systematic review of product-scarcity marketing literature; eligible (review of empirical scarcity literature).
Judgment and Decision Making 2018 three studies on psychological distance × victim identifiability for donation willingness; eligible (experimental, donation outcome per §4.4, construal mechanism).
Journal of Marketing 2018 research on sales control × salesperson performance via regulatory-fit and exploratory/exploitative learning; eligible (directly on-thesis — sales-performance outcome).
J Consumer Research 2017 five studies on sensory imagery × psychological distance × consumer evaluations; eligible (experimental, construal mechanism, consumer outcome).
J Marketing Management 2017 — duplicate of i=6 (deterring deviant consumer behavior); flag at dedup-extraction.

J Health Comm 2015 focus-group qualitative study (N=9) on Cialdini six principles × safer-sex communication; qualitative not experimental per §2.5; need full text to check if any quantitative component eligible.
Journal of Communication 2014 study on prospect theory + emotions × organ donation narratives; eligible (experimental, framing, donation outcome).
Journal of Marketing 2013 experiments on food images (alone vs consummatory) × taste perceptions; eligible (experimental, social-proof imagery, consumer outcome).
Health Communication 2013 focus-group qualitative study (n=9) on Cialdini six principles × condom-use decisions; qualitative not experimental; need full text per §2.5.
OBHDP 2012 study on myopic loss aversion key factors; eligible (experimental, loss-aversion framing, financial-decision outcome).
J Advertising 2011 two studies on limited-quantity vs limited-time scarcity messages × purchase intent moderated by brand concept; eligible.
J Consumer Research 2010 study on regulatory construal fit × consumer-goal × message-concreteness for persuasion; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit + construal, persuasion outcome).
JESP 2010 on psychological distance × value-behavior correspondence in ultimatum bargaining and integrative negotiation; eligible (experimental, negotiation outcome).
J Marketing Communications 2010 study on regulatory fit × GM-foods buying intent (social-identification mediator); eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, buying-intent outcome).
JPSP 2008 PMID on negotiators with unmitigated communion × economic costs in bargaining; eligible (experimental, negotiation outcome including economic-cost outcome).
EJSP 2006 five studies on power × optimism × risk-taking with gain/loss frame; not commercial decision context; need full text per §2.1.
JMR 2006 on regulatory fit × monetary value of consumer choices × persuasion; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, consumer-decision outcome).
Blackwell Handbook 2004 chapter on framing/loss-aversion/mental-accounting; eligible (review of empirical literature).
JPSP 2004 on regulatory fit 'feeling right' transfer to persuasion; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, persuasion outcome).
Communication Research 2000 on gratification niches of e-mail vs telephone; communication-medium-comparison research, not persuasion intervention; fails §2.1/§2.2.
OBHDP 1995 on framing × resource dilemmas × sanctions; dilemma games not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
EJSP 1994 on gain-loss frames × satisfaction with outcome-differences (cooperative/noncooperative); negotiation-relevant; eligible.
EJSP 1992 on cooperative decision-making × gain/loss frames; dilemma games not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
JMR 1981 — duplicate of i=249 (FITD + cash incentives survey response); flag at dedup-extraction.
PSPB 1981 reanalysis of Milgram studies through FITD lens; eligible (FITD-framework reanalysis of compliance literature).
JPSP 1981 — duplicate of i=4 (Cialdini lowball Task or Person Commitment); flag at dedup-extraction.
JMR 1980 — duplicate of i=91 (DITF business context); flag at dedup-extraction.
JPSP 1978 — duplicate of i=10 (Cialdini et al. lowball original); flag at dedup-extraction.
J Consumer Research 1977 Scott — FITD for socially-conscious behavior modification; eligible (experimental, FITD, behavior-change outcome in consumer context).
JESP 1974 follow-up data on FITD by Freedman/Fraser tradition; eligible (FITD compliance experiment).
Ecological Economics 2025 N=1317 online experiment on sufficiency-gain framing for sufficiency behavior; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior outcome).
Ecological Economics 2024 N=897 online experiment on gain-loss framing × voluntary pro-environmental effort; eligible.
NBER 2022 field experiment on $50 loss vs gain framed incentive for health clinic visit; eligible (field experiment, framing, behavior outcome).
Food Quality and Preference 2021 experiment on gain framing × plant-based eating in university catering; eligible (experimental, framing, food-choice consumer outcome).
HICSS 2021 on gain-loss framing × homeowner mitigation/insurance decisions; eligible (experimental, framing, insurance-purchase outcome — directly commercial-decision).

Visual Communication Quarterly 2019 N=455 experiment on gain-loss framing × emotional imagery × behavior intent; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior intent — message topics included travel/food rewards).

Human Behavior and Emerging Technologies 2019 on social media (FB) comments × authority/social-proof × nanodesigned food acceptance; eligible (experimental, social-proof, consumer-acceptance outcome).
BMC Public Health 2019 field experiment on three nudges (accessibility, salience, social-proof) × take-away food choices; eligible (field experiment, social-proof, consumer-food-choice outcome).
Science Communication 2018 2×2 experiment on threat × gain/loss framing for climate-change advocacy; climate-policy attitude outcome, not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
Substance Use & Misuse 2009 case study on recruitment-marketing strategies for drug-using MSM into clinical trial; recruitment study, not commercial; need full text for design eligibility.
Health Education Research 2009 tailored-intervention study on framing × physical activity promotion; eligible (intervention, framing, behavior outcome).
Nicotine & Tobacco Research 2008 study on framing × gender × smoking cessation persuasion; eligible (experimental, framing, intent-to-quit outcome).

Int J Business and Management Insights 2025 review of ethical digital marketing, consumer trust, responsible AI; conceptual/review without primary empirical contribution; flag for review-type per §4.8.
J Retailing Consumer Services 2025 study on visual appeal × social-proof × influencer ads engagement; eligible (commercial context, social-proof, consumer-engagement outcome).
J Business & Retail Management Research 2023 case study on Vichy social-proof and profitability; case-study design, not experimental; need full text per §4.5.
Social Psychological and Personality Science 2022 study on preference-for-consistency × low-ball technique effectiveness; eligible (experimental, lowball, compliance outcome).
J Retailing Consumer Services 2020 study on persuasive location-based messaging × store-visit intent for fashion shoppers; eligible (commercial context, persuasion technique, visit-intent outcome).
Frontiers in Psychology 2020 PMID on framing + anchoring × consumer attitude/purchase intent for organic food; eligible (experimental, two mechanisms, purchase outcome).
Oxford Research Encyclopedia of Psychology 2016 review by Cialdini-tradition on six universal principles of influence × compliance; eligible (synthesis of empirical literature).
J Psychology 2014 study on DITF × delay × blood-donation request; eligible (experimental, DITF, donation outcome).
J Applied Soc Psych 2011 three studies on foot-in-the-face (FITD+DITF hybrid) technique; eligible (experimental, hybrid compliance technique, compliance outcome).
